verses.text: A manpha paknamtui sangin minpha hoihzaw a, i suah ni sangin i sih ni hoihzaw hi
Pawisimna sangin sigalna hoihzaw hi. Sih ding bek a ngak ahihna mihing khempeuh in a phawk ding uh kilawm hi
Nuihna sangin dahna hoihzaw hi; na mai hong gumsak zahin na thu theihna hong khangsak hi
Mipilte dahna lakah omtual a, mihaite nopna lakah omtual hi
Mihaite in pahtawina la hong sak sangin mipilte' hong taina hoihzaw hi
Mihaite' nuihna pen meikuang sunga selkeu kikhul a puak zaizai tawh kibang a, khiatna neilo, a mawknapi ahi hi
Mipil khat in midangte a khem ciangin mihai bangin a gamta ahi hi. Sumgolh lakna in a lapa' gamtat hoihna siasak hi
Thu khatpeuh a kipatna sangin a tawpna hoihzaw a, kiphatsakna sangin lungduaina hoihzaw hi
Heh pahpah kei in; hehna a haihuai ahi hi
“Bang hangin nidang lai-in hih sangin hoihzaw tham ahi hiam?” ci-in dong kei in. Tua bangte pil thudotna hilo hi
Pilna pen hauhna zahin hoih a, mihingte-a' dingin phattuamna ahi hi
Sum in hong lungmuan'sak bangin pilna in zong hong lungmuangsak hi. Pilna a manphatna, a pilte a nuntaksak theihna ahi hi
Pasian' sepsate ngaihsun dih in. Pasian in a kawi-a a bawlsate kua in mamsakkik thei ahi hiam
Nopna na ngah laitakin lungdam in; haksatna na tuah ciangin hih thu ngaihsun in: Lungdamna leh lungkhamna hong piapa pen Pasian hi a, mailamah bang piang ding cih kuamah in theilo hi
Ka nuntakna a mawknapi hi a, ahi zongin ka nuntak sungin thu khempeuh ka thei hi. Mi khat hoih napi-in si a, mi khat siahuai napi-in a khan' sau hi
Tua ahih ciangin hoihlua kei in la, lah sia lua kei in. Bang hangin nang kisiasak tawm ding na hi hiam
Gilo lua, hau lua kei in. Bang hangin khan'sih laizang ding na hi hiam
A nih tuakin lenkip in. Pasian na zahtak nak leh khat peuhpeuh na zuihna-ah na ma vang ding hi
Khuapi a uk mihing sawm sangin pilna in mi khat hatsak zaw hi
A manin a gamta, a khial ngei hetlo, leitungah mi khat zong om hetlo hi
Mi' gen khempeuh thudon kei in. Na nasempa' hong samsiatna na zakha ding hi
Nang zong midang na samsiat zelzelna teltakin na kithei hi.
Hihte khempeuh ka pilna tawh ka ze-et a, pil ding ka hahkat hangin kei' batzawh ding hilo hi
Mihing nuntakna kua in theikhia zo ding ahi hiam? Eite-a' dingin thuk lua a, telhak lua hi
Keimah in pilna siamna ka theihna ding, pilna mu-in thupiangte a hang ka theihna dingin nakpi takin hanciamin ka lungsim ka pia a, haina a hoihlohna leh a haihuaina ka theikhia hi

Sihna sangin numei a siahuai zawkna ka theikhia hi. Ama hong piak itna in thang bangin hong tepcip a, ama hong kawina khut in sikkhau bangin hong hencip hi. Pasian' deihna bangin a gamtate in tua bang numei pelhthei a, ahi zongin a mawh nuamte a thang-ah a awk uh hi
Thugen siampa in hih bangin ci hi: Thu ka kan ciangin, a banbanin thu ka phawkkhia hi
A thudang ka zon'zon' hangin bangmah ka muzo nawnkei hi. Pasal tul khat sung pan khat bang bek a pil a omkhak theihna, ahi zongin numei lakah a pil cih bang a omlohna keimah in ka phawkkhia hi
Keima theihkhiat thu in: Pasian in eite a thuman dingin hong bawl hinapi-in, eite in paulap tuamtuam zongin, i kikai-awksak hi.
